testcase.name: testStore

error.message:
element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (75, 29). Other element would receive the click:
(Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.57) Build info: version: '4.20.0', revision: '866c76ca80' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '25.0.2' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [f1252d0d24f5ece12556db01529b1533, clickElement {id=f.194818C11CC7A830593721D2905EF8E6.d.3797673A5263CFA1461DB85D847677C2.e.21588}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.57, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.56 (b28eac7a1a97..., userDataDir: C:\Users\sebastian\Document...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:51771}, goog:processID: 17940, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:51771/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.57, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (f1252d0d24f5ece12556db01529b1533)] -> css selector: span.menu-title] Session ID: f1252d0d24f5ece12556db01529b1533
